productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Grey Casual Shoes
description: These flying machine shoes are inspired by a retro-esque fusion of fashion with contemporary styles. Iconic and synonymous with style in the youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. Cut a dash to all off-duty dos with these throwback classic canvas shoes. Wear this with form fitting denims, a monochrome T-shirt and a casual jacket. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Central lacing for snug Fit Nubuck toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Eyelets on the midfoot for ventilation Midsole Midsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Brick and herringbone patterned grooves on the outsole Slipper care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
